routes.name: Skerries Loop
routes.description: North Dublin coastal loop out to Skerries and back. Flat and fast with sea views.

routes.name: Skerries via the Lanes
routes.description: The long way to Skerries through the country lanes. Rolling north Dublin roads with a coastal finish.

routes.name: Dublin Canal Ride
routes.description: Flat loop following the canals west to Celbridge and back. Perfect Sunday spin.

routes.name: Canals
routes.description: Dublin to Athlone and back on the canal towpaths and roads. A proper full-day adventure.

routes.name: Wicklow 200
routes.description: 200km through the Wicklow Mountains via Gorey. 3,400m of climbing. When you're done, you're done.

routes.name: Coll de Rates
routes.description: Classic Calpe climb over the Coll de Rates. Stunning views of the Marina Alta from the top.

routes.name: Guadalest Loop
routes.description: Big day from Calpe inland to Guadalest and Castell de Castells. Serious climbing through the mountains of the Marina Alta.

routes.name: Bernia Loop
routes.description: Short but punchy loop from Calpe around the Sierra de Bernia. Every metre of climbing earned.

routes.name: Alcalali Loop
routes.description: Century loop from Calpe through the Jalon valley via Alcalali. Rolling inland roads with 2,000m of climbing.

routes.name: Javea Loop
routes.description: Coastal ride from Calpe to Javea and back. The easiest of the Calpe loops but still has bite.

routes.name: Denia Loop
routes.description: Calpe to Denia along the coast with an inland return. Great mix of coastal flats and interior climbing.
